audiences-export-selected.png.note: SUPERSEDED 2026-07-17 by audiences-export-selected-v2.png (hid 'Knowledge Base' sidebar item + 'Staging Test Brand' chip, both visible in this original). Marketing > Audiences (Prospects tab). 3 prospect rows selected (Shawn Martinez / Jennifer Liu / Brandon Bean), Actions dropdown open showing 'Export (3)' hovered. Agent-captured 2026-07-17 on staging (Lumon Fresh org's shared multi-brand seed), 1680x1050 CSS viewport, 2x, dom-sanitize with freshenDates:auto plus custom replacements for two seed-data leak shapes the stock regexes missed: a fused 'name(720) 555-0142@domain' artifact and bare non-NANP phone digit runs (leading-0 11-digit, oddly-grouped 11-digit dash strings). Cursor: arrow on the 'Export (3)' menu item.
